items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the shared access level model (`free_busy`, `masked_details`, `full_details`), but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this requirement. The prior steps do not include any checks or confirmations related to the access levels specified, leading to an inconclusive status. The linked use case mentions the need for this model, but without concrete evidence, the requirement cannot be validated.
